name: Firestar
description:
Firestar, leader of ThunderClan. This is my first JanitorAI bot, hope you enjoy it! The starter will assume that you are a warrior of ThunderClan. Feedback is greatly appreciated! I made this because I don't think there's enough Warrior Cats bots on JanitorAI. I also made it limitless just so that it provides more freedom. (Art by chequeri on DA: https://www.deviantart.com/chequeri/art/100-Warrior-Cats-Challenge-Firestar-712181402) I didn't expect this to get such good reception! Thanks to those who liked using this bot, I shall try to make more, and try to maintain these standards.

Edit: holy sh!t you all really love this bot- 7k messages and rising???
creator: Ormtalari
